## Summary

<!-- What changed and why. -->

## Review checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest -q`) and in CI
- [ ] Logic changes are covered by tests
- [ ] Deterministic core behavior is unchanged, or intentionally updated with tests
- [ ] Any AI-assisted step remains advisory and human-gated
- [ ] No real data — all inputs remain fully synthetic
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior or usage changed
